title: Banana muffins
excerpt: Ingredients: 4 very ripe bananas 200 ml sugar 1 beaten egg 80 ml butter melted 5 ml baking powder 5 ml bicarbonate of soda 5 ml ground cinnamon 375 ml flour 2 ml caramel essence (if you don't have it, vanilla essence will also do) Method: 1. Mash the bananas. 2. Beat the …
html:
Ingredients:

  • 4 very ripe bananas
  • 200 ml sugar
  • 1 beaten egg
  • 80 ml butter melted
  • 5 ml baking powder
  • 5 ml bicarbonate of soda
  • 5 ml ground cinnamon
  • 375 ml flour
  • 2 ml caramel essence ( if you don't have it, vanilla essence will also do)

Method:

1. Mash the bananas.
2. Beat the egg, sugar and melted butter together
3. Add the bananas
4. Beat in the caramel essence
5. Sift the flour, baking powder and bicarbonate of soda into the banana mixture.
6. Mix everything together.
7. Grease a muffin pan and fill the cups 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 180 C

Easy!
